# BRIEF

## User-Facing Goal

Users on phones should be able to browse projects, edit settings, upload images, and use QR tools without cramped or awkward layouts.

## Success Criteria

- Dashboard rows remain readable and tappable on mobile.
- Project settings controls wrap cleanly on smaller screens.
- Upload and QR sections fit more naturally on mobile.
- Save/status/delete areas remain easy to use without crowding.

## UX Notes

- Prefer stronger stacking over squeezed horizontal layouts.
- Preserve the calm visual style.
- Keep touch targets comfortable.

## Risks Or Tradeoffs

- Small-screen polish may make desktop spacing slightly different, so changes should stay balanced.
